texto: In order to fit our needs and wants, we are constantly adjusting and altering our behaviors and feelings. I call it, improving ourselves by means through the inner self.

explicacao: Citação de Efrat Cybulkiewicz sobre temas ligados a familia. “My child reflect the treatment I give.” articula familia, child, child-development em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como child-development e child-love.
